====Pokémon====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Kofu
|pkmn=Pelipper
|type1=Water
|type2=Flying
|img=Kofu Pelipper Adventures.png
|epnum=PASV25
|epname= 
|desc={{p|Pelipper}} is Kofu's first known Pokémon. Kofu lent it to {{Violet}} so he could fly to a nearby watchtower [[Arven]] was hiding on top of. When {{p|Great Tusk}} found and attacked Arven, Violet had Pelipper strike with a {{m|Hydro Pump}}. This weakened Great Tusk enough for Violet and Arven to defeat it with their Pokémon.

Pelipper's only known move is {{m|Hydro Pump}}.}}

{{anchor|Wugtrio 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Kofu
|pkmn=Wugtrio
|type1=Water
|img=Kofu Wugtrio Adventures.png
|epnum=PASV25
|epname=
|desc={{p|Wugtrio}} is Kofu's second known Pokémon. It was first used alongside [[Saguaro]]'s {{p|Hatterene}} to assist {{Violet}} and [[Arven]] battle the {{pkmn2|Titan}} {{p|Iron Treads}}. It used its multiple heads to keep Iron Treads from moving, giving Violet and Arven the opportunity to defeat it with a combined attack from their Pokémon.

None of Wugtrio's moves are known.}}
